name: S.T.A.F.F.
description: Notes A unique weapon that was one of two introduced to showcase the new burst-fire function (along with B.O.W.), which causes the weapon to fire a certain number of shots before needing to pause for a certain amount of time. The time between the bursts can be decreased (up to a cap) through anything that increases fire rate, such as DEX or the Berserk buff.
effects: Burst Count: 5 Maximum Burst Delay: 1.8 seconds Minimum Burst Delay: 1 second Shots face direction
